name: material-ui-styling
tagline: Helps pick the right MUI styling layer: sx prop, styled(), theme overrides, or global CSS.
verdict: Concise, well-scoped index skill delegating detail to AGENTS.md/reference.md; no security issues found in the visible content. Missing NOT-for exclusions risks misfiring against its near-identical sibling skill (material-ui-nextjs). Referenced files cannot be verified without a file inventory.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' exclusions; overlaps with sibling skill material-ui-nextjs (SSR/wiring), risking misfire between them.
